sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106704" key="u(mnagwgo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑμν-ᾰγωγός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n106704.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">leader of a hymn,</tr_> Kourouniotes <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Ἐλευσινιακά</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.225</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> <date TEIform="date">(i B.C.)</date>.</sense> </entryFree>
